title: suaeda maritima subsp. jacquinii
intro: Suaeda maritima subsp. jacquinii, also known as sea-blite, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the family Chenopodiaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, often to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
